title: electranthera mutica var. miahuatlana
intro: Electranthera mutica var. miahuatlana, also known as the Mexican angelica or Mexican angelica root, is a plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae. Traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine, Electranthera mutica var. miahuatlana is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. Its health benefits include the potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, Electranthera mutica var. miahuatlana is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
